2604.12190.title: Characterizing Resource Sharing Practices on Underground Internet Forum Synthetic Non-Consensual Intimate Image Content Creation Communities
2604.12190.paper_summary: Many malicious actors responsible for disseminating synthetic non-consensual intimate imagery (SNCII) operate within internet forums to exchange resources, strategies, and generated content across multiple platforms. Technically-sophisticated actors gravitate toward certain communities (e.g., 4chan), while lower-sophistication end-users are more active on others (e.g., Reddit). To characterize key stakeholders in the broader ecosystem, we perform an integrated analysis of multiple communities, analyzing 282,154 4chan comments and 78,308 Reddit submissions spanning 165 days between June and November 2025 to characterize involved actors, actions, and resources. We find: (a) that users with differing levels of technical sophistication employ and share a wide range of primary resources facilitating SNCII content creation as well as numerous secondary resources facilitating dissemination; and (b) that knowledge transfer between experts and newcomers facilitates propagation of these illicit resources. Based on our empirical analysis, we identify gaps in existing SNCII regulatory infrastructure and synthesize several critical intervention points for bolstering deterrence.
2604.12190.paper_summary_zh: 許多負責散播合成非自願親密影像 (SNCII) 的惡意行為者在網路論壇中運作，以交換資源、策略和生成的內容，跨越多個平台。技術上精熟的行為者傾向於某些社群（例如，4chan），而技術水平較低的最終用戶則在其他社群（例如，Reddit）上更為活躍。為了描繪更廣泛生態系統中的主要利益相關者，我們對多個社群進行綜合分析，分析了282,154條4chan評論和78,308條Reddit提交，這些數據涵蓋了2025年6月至11月的165天，以描繪涉及的行為者、行動和資源。我們發現：（a）具有不同技術水平的用戶使用和分享廣泛的主要資源，以促進SNCII內容創作，以及眾多的次要資源以促進散播；（b）專家與新手之間的知識轉移促進了這些非法資源的傳播。根據我們的實證分析，我們確定了現有SNCII監管基礎設施中的空白，並綜合了幾個關鍵干預點，以加強威懾力。
2604.12190.author: Bernardo B. P. Medeiros et.al.
2604.12190.authors: Bernardo B. P. Medeiros, Malvika Jadhav, Allison Lu, Tadayoshi Kohno, Vincent Bindschaedler, Kevin R. B. Butler
